nasb.text: Day and night they go around her upon her walls, And iniquity and mischief are in her midst.

esv.text: Day and night they go around it on its walls, and iniquity and trouble are within it;

cnv.text: 惡人日夜在城牆上繞行， 在城裡盡是邪惡與禍害；

ccb.text: 他们昼夜在城墙上出没， 城内充满了邪恶和压迫，

csbs.text: 它们昼夜在城墙上绕行， 坏事和祸患也在城中；
